verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g
all required fields present
all features in part_tree have corresponding geometry_ops
interfaces match neighboring subsystems
critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter IT6 tolerance standards.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity compromise if cooling fins are not properly attached.
risk.mit: Ensure cooling fins are securely fastened with visible locking evidence.

risk.desc: Possibility of incorrect mating if connector keying is not clearly marked.
risk.mit: Label connectors with clear keying identifiers.

risk.desc: Risk of access issues if hatch is not properly aligned with service path.
risk.mit: Ensure hatch alignment with service path is precise.

risk.desc: Potential for display inaccuracy if cutaway window does not provide clear view.
risk.mit: Verify cutaway window provides unobstructed view of internal components.

generated_parts.label: Stage 1 Bell Nozzle Display Shell
generated_parts.spec: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface

requirements: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface
Vehicle context: Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator
Suggested material: Al 7075 + CFRP + Inconel + ablative, process: LPBF + CFRP layup

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g <= 1000g
All required evidence_features appear in part_tree/geometry_ops
Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence
Blueprint includes all required fields and geometry_ops

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness in the bell_nozzle_shell due to optimization for reduced weight.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis (FEA) to ensure structural integrity.

risk.desc: Inadequate strain relief for cables exiting the bell_nozzle_shell.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry (clamps, grommets) at every cable exit point.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to loose bolt_circle_dummy.
risk.mit: Ensure bolt_circle_dummy has sufficient clearance and alignment keys.

risk.desc: Engine_display_cartridge may not be easily accessible for maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cutaway_window for better accessibility.

risk.desc: Potential for incorrect mating of connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Label and key connectors to prevent mis-mating.

integration_opportunities.description: Increase cutaway_window size for better inspection.
Optimize bell_nozzle_shell thickness for weight savings.
Add more harness_passthrough points for additional cables.

verification_focus.description: Verify bell_nozzle_shell can withstand launch vibration tests.
Confirm bolt_circle_dummy aligns correctly with stage_engine_mock.

generated_parts.label: Turbopump Assembly Display Dummy

verify.rule: All required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
The estimated mass matches the specified mass budget.
Each part in the part_tree has corresponding geometry_ops that define its shape and location.
Adjacent interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection details are reciprocal.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of visible locking evidence on critical joints.
risk.mit: Add visible locking evidence such as washers or inserts to critical joints.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity issues if the estimated mass is significantly off from the actual manufactured mass.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough mass verification tests post-manufacturing.

risk.desc: Display accuracy may suffer if the cutaway windows do not provide clear visibility into the internal components.
risk.mit: Ensure cutaway windows are properly positioned and sized for optimal visibility.
